creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmm.  I've tested this 'How-To-Repeat' on my XFree86-3.3.1.  But
'title' string was displayed.  Of course, I cannot input Russian words 
so tested title is English.

  And, my X has ru_SU.KOI8-R alias like this:

% grep ru_SU.KOI8-R /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/locale/locale.*
/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/locale/locale.alias:ru_SU.KOI8-R	ru_RU.KOI8-R


Jun
